violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Wood blocks under espresso machine need painted or clear stained. -Shelf under microwave needs painted.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Right prep cutting board needs deep cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not maintained in good repair. -Flooring has tears and needs repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ceiling dust needs cleaned.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
